prose.en: Annual Independent Assessments for 20x (requirement varies by certification class; see class tailorings and the class-variants payload).

a.statement: Providers with 20x Class A Certifications MUST meet the expectations of their underlying alternative security framework as part of their persistent independent verification and validation assessment.

b.statement: Providers with 20x Class B Certifications MUST include all Key Security Indicators in a FedRAMP independent assessment at least once per year.

c.statement: Providers with 20x Class C Certifications MUST include all Key Security Indicators in a FedRAMP independent assessment at least once per year.

d.statement: Providers with 20x Class D Certifications MUST include all Key Security Indicators in a FedRAMP independent assessment at least once per year.
